\tzpentry{ID5489}{Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5489 introduces Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \dot{\rho} &= -\frac{i}{\hbar}\,[H_{\mathrm{TZPQVT}},\rho] + \mathcal{D}[\rho],\\ \mathcal{D}[\rho] &= \sum_k \left(L_k \rho L_k^\dagger - \frac{1}{2}\{L_k^\dagger L_k,\rho\}\right). \end{align}
